project_title: Library Book Borrowing and Reservation System
summary: The generated artifacts show partial implementation of functional requirements, with significant gaps in core functionalities. Non-functional requirements have limited evidence of implementation.

issues: Search functionality is not implemented; only a placeholder exists.
Borrowing functionality is not implemented; only a placeholder exists.
Reservation functionality is not implemented; only a placeholder exists.

evidence: routes/main_routes.py - Placeholder for viewing loans functionality
issues: Viewing loans functionality is not implemented; only a placeholder exists.

evidence: routes/main_routes.py - Placeholder for adding new books functionality
issues: Adding new books functionality is not implemented; only a placeholder exists.

issues: Updating book records functionality is not implemented; only a placeholder exists.

issues: Marking books as borrowed or returned functionality is not implemented; only a placeholder exists.

issues: Managing overdue items functionality is not implemented; only a placeholder exists.

issues: Preventing borrowing limit functionality is not implemented; only a placeholder exists.

issues: Sending notifications functionality is not implemented; only a placeholder exists.

evidence: app.py - User authentication is set up.
routes/main_routes.py - Placeholder for logging actions functionality
issues: Logging actions functionality is not implemented; only a placeholder exists.

issues: Removing books functionality is not implemented; only a placeholder exists.
No implementation evidence for performance requirements.

evidence: README.md - Usability is mentioned in the README.

traceability_issues: Functional requirements FR-01 to FR-10 and FR-12, FR-13 are only placeholders with no actual implementation.
NFR-01 has no corresponding implementation evidence.
code_quality_issues: No documentation for functions in routes.
recommendations: Implement core functionalities for searching, borrowing, reserving, and managing books.
Add error handling for all routes to improve robustness.
Provide documentation for each route and functionality to enhance maintainability.
overall_assessment: The project is in early stages with significant gaps in functional implementations, while some non-functional requirements are partially addressed.
